programs.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programs.desc: Mateo is saved by Z-Blob who has returned to unbox him from Dreamsmasher’s prison. The two dream chasers unbox the rest of their team and wreak havoc in the GLOWING ORB in order to try and retrieve Lunia’s hourglass and save the dream world from harm. But not everything is as it appears, as Mateo’s plan seems to go more smoothly than he had imagined.

programs.title: The Nanny
programs.desc: Maxwell and Fran face a difference in opinion on how to raise the children when Maxwell reverses a decision Fran made regarding not allowing Brighton to go to the mall.

programs.title: The Nanny
programs.desc: Maggie is upset when Fran inherits a mink coat. Fran decides to give it up to appease Maggie, but Sylvia won't hear of it.

programs.title: The Addams Family
programs.desc: Uncle Fester hopes to shed a few pounds before his pen pal arrives.

programs.title: The Addams Family
programs.desc: Discovering a treasure map in the sea chest of Great Grandfather Peg-Leg Addams the pirate, Gomez and Morticia decide to hire a boat to go look for it.

programs.title: Bewitched
programs.desc: Serena turns Darrin's mother into a cat.
